reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_13]]
Speaker 1: Golden Gate University, located in one of the world’s greatest cities—San Francisco—is a distinctive and highly accomplished institution with a history spanning more than 120 years.

[[BLOCK:srt_14]]
Speaker 1: Throughout its long development, the university has remained dedicated to serving working professionals, helping them advance in their careers.

[[BLOCK:srt_15]]
Speaker 1: It is, in every sense, an exceptional institution—one that has embraced a spirit of innovation since its founding.

[[BLOCK:srt_16]]
Speaker 1: That spirit of innovation continues to define us today.

[[BLOCK:srt_17]]
Speaker 1: Today, Golden Gate University serves not only San Francisco and the surrounding region but has grown into a global university, with thousands of students around the world. They study in both English and Mandarin, with plans to expand into additional languages in the future.

[[BLOCK:srt_18]]
Speaker 1: Our mission has remained constant: to help working professionals advance their careers and achieve their life goals.

[[BLOCK:srt_19]]
Speaker 1: We are excited to begin a new chapter for Golden Gate University—bringing our San Francisco–born mission to the world.

[[BLOCK:srt_20]]
Speaker 2: I’d like to add that I’ve maintained a close relationship with Golden Gate University for more than 30 years. When I was at Bank of America (Bank of America), we regularly sent employees to earn degrees at the university to help them grow professionally and strengthen their expertise.

[[BLOCK:srt_21]]
Speaker 2: It gives me great pleasure now to return to Golden Gate University and offer the same opportunities for growth to students around the globe.

[[BLOCK:srt_22]]
Speaker 3: Thank you both.

[[BLOCK:srt_23]]
Speaker 3: Golden Gate University has a history of more than 112 years and has long focused on career-oriented and professional education.

[[BLOCK:srt_24]]
Speaker 3: Could you share how Golden Gate University’s educational model and philosophy have shaped the distinctive institution it is today?
